hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'backend/go-cms' && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.go$'; then OUT=$(cd 'c:/Vivek/Pesonal/Serenya/Project/CMS/gocms/gg-cms/backend/go-cms' && go build ./... 2>&1); [ -n "$OUT" ] && jq -n --arg ctx "go build ./... FAILED — fix before proceeding:\n$OUT" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":$ctx}}' && exit 0; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'frontend/react-ui' && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then OUT=$(cd 'c:/Vivek/Pesonal/Serenya/Project/CMS/gocms/gg-cms/frontend/react-ui' && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json 2>&1); [ -n "$OUT" ] && jq -n --arg ctx "tsc --noEmit FAILED — fix before proceeding:\n$OUT" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":$ctx}}' && exit 0; fi
